SELECT d.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(f.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_attendance
FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES f
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY d ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;

question: Provide a breakdown by state and area type in India showing the total BCG vaccinations and average first dose of Pentavalent, focusing only on locations with multiple immunization records.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE, T2.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T1.BCG_VACCINE), AVG(T1.PENTAVALENT_1) FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.COUNTRY = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE, T2.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T1.IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    g.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fcir.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg,
    AVG(fcir.PENTAVALENT_1) AS avg_pentavalent_1
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE fcir
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fcir.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    fcir.GEOGRAPHY_ID IN (
        SELECT geography_id
        FROM fact_child_immunization_routine
        GROUP BY geography_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    g.STATE,
    g.TYPE_OF_AREA;

    g.STATE,
    g.TYPE_OF_AREA,
    SUM(fcir.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg,
